programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: A spoiled rat gets flushed down the toilet and finds himself stranded in Londons sewer underworld. A savvy scavenger helps him evade frog assassins and make his way back to his plush home.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A life-saving surgery fuses together a police officer and his faithful police dog -- and Dog Man is born. Learning to embrace his new identity, Dog Man must stop feline supervillain Petey the Cat from cloning himself and going on a crime spree.

programme.title: The Ogglies
programme.desc: Young Max meets the Ogglies, a family of green, garbage-eating creatures who live at the dump in the town of Smelliville. When a contractor plans to build a wellness temple at the dump, Max and his pal must hatch a plan to save the Ogglies home.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: A dragon, an orphaned boy, and a mountain spirit work together as they trek through the Himalayas in search for the Rim of Heaven.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Concerned that his half-human grandson isnt showing his vampire side, Dracula and his friends put the boy through a `monster-in-training boot camp just as Dracs old-school father decides to pay a visit.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: Poppy, the optimistic leader of the trolls, and Branch, her polar opposite, embark on an adventure that takes them far beyond the only world theyve ever known.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: Barry B Benson is an everybee with a dream. He escapes the hive and makes contact with a human, the florist Vanessa Bloome. Enraged to discover that humans have been stealing their honey goodness, Barry sets out on a crusade that will change the ecosystem forever. Will it be for the better? A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: A dragon, an orphaned boy, and a mountain spirit work together as they trek through the Himalayas in search for the Rim of Heaven.

programme.desc: Concerned that his half-human grandson isnt showing his vampire side, Dracula and his friends put the boy through a `monster-in-training boot camp just as Dracs old-school father decides to pay a visit.

Enraged to discover that humans have been stealing their honey goodness, Barry sets out on a crusade that will change the ecosystem forever. Will it be for the better? A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Super-Charlie
programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Greg and Pam have been together for ten years, and now theyre the proud parents of two adorable twins. However, money is tight and in order to keep his family afloat, devoted nurse Greg takes a second job working for a drug company. That development doesnt sit well with Jack, whose previous suspicions regarding his hapless son-in-law soon come back in full force after learning of this development.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Weaving in and out of the love lives of eight loosely inter-related couples. The bachelor Prime Minister falls for his personal assistant, his brother-in-law is flirting with one of his colleagues, a writer heads off to France and pursues an affair with a maid, and an 11-year-old boy asks his father for advice on matters of the heart.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: The wife of a dentist convinces him to betray their new neighbour - a hit man turned informant - to the Chicago gangsters who want him dead. In need of money in order to hurry through a divorce, the young man arranges a meeting with the Mob in which he will exchange information for cash, but when his scheming wife tells the hit man what he is up to, it is the dentists life that is placed in grave danger.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Skincare
programme.desc: A famed aesthetician faces a new challenge when a rival opens a skin care boutique directly across from her store. Suspecting that someone is trying to sabotage her, she embarks on a quest to unravel the mystery of whos trying to destroy her life.

programme.title: The Shamrock Spitfire
programme.desc: The youngest wing commander in the history of the Royal Air Force, 21-year-old Brendan Spitfire Paddy Finucane became one of the most celebrated fighter aces of the Second World War.

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: Young Liberian refugee Jacqueline barely escapes her war-torn country to settle on a Greek island. Her daily struggle for survival keeps terrible memories at bay, and she becomes close to an American tour guide.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: The Shamrock Spitfire
programme.desc: The youngest wing commander in the history of the Royal Air Force, 21-year-old Brendan Spitfire Paddy Finucane became one of the most celebrated fighter aces of the Second World War.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Young Jim has to grow up fast after the Japanese invade Shanghai. Separated from his parents and alone in a prisoner of war camp, Jim must fight to survive.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Coach Ken Carter, a controversial high school basketball coach who received national attention when he benched his undefeated team due to their collective poor academic record in 1999. In the face of much criticism, Carter fought to keep his methods, determined to show the boys that they need to rely on more than sports for their futures.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedys assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a sex worker from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as the parents set out for New York to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a sex worker from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as the parents set out for New York to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Sketch
programme.desc: Fantastical creatures come to life when a girls sketchbook falls into a strange pond. As the town starts to unravel, she and her brother must track down the unpredictable, chaotic and dangerously real monsters before they cause permanent damage.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: A teen and his new stepfather find an island of secrets, strange life forms and gold after they answer a coded distress signal.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: A New York couple go to an orphanage to adopt a brother for their only son, but instead come away with a little mouse. On arrival at his new home, the diminutive rodent receives a lukewarm welcome by the boy - and an even frostier reception from the pet cat. Featuring a mixture of live action and animation.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: Eleven years after their horrific experiences at reform school, Tommy Marcano and John Reilly have become two-bit American gangsters, Lorenzo Carcaterra is a reporter and Michael Sullivan an assistant DA. The four are reunited when they chance across one of the abusive guards and take the chance for revenge.

programme.title: The Cinema List: British Women
programme.desc: The Cinema List spotlights trailblazing British women directors, from `Mamma Mia! to `Promising Young Woman, celebrating female filmmaking talent.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick-change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young lawyer joins a small but prestigious law firm only to find out that most of their clients are on the wrong side of the law. The company is helping to launder mob money, get clients off charges and even murder partners who threaten to blow their cover, but when the FBI come calling to gather evidence on the lawyers colleagues, he is caught between a rock and a hard place, juggling his life and his liberty.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: While visiting London with his family, Jack Ryan foils an IRA attempt to assassinate a government minister, killing one of the attackers in the process. Swearing vengeance, the IRAs Sean Miller follows Ryan and his family to their seaside home in America where he and his followers plan to exact their revenge.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. However, when an expert claims that the attacks are the work of a giant great white shark, there is only one solution - to kill the monster fish before it can feed again.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielbergs 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: A hit man falls for his bosss wife when he is asked to escort her on a date, a boxer reneges on his promise to throw a big fight, and a couple attempt a heist that rapidly escalates out of control.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick-change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick-change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: Old rivalries and new adversaries await Daniel and Miyagi as they travel to Okinawa to visit Miyagis ailing father.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III
programme.desc: A boy trained in the martial arts is alienated from his mentor just when he needs to prepare for a showdown with his arch-enemy. Instead, he turns to a Vietnam vet who teaches him how to fight dirty - a strategy the youth comes to realise is a mistake.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: After moving to China, twelve-year-old Dre Parker falls in love with his classmate Mei Ying. This soon comes to the attention of the class bully, Cheng.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: After moving to New York City, kung fu prodigy Li Fong enters a karate competition -- but his skills alone arent enough. With help from Mr. Han and Daniel LaRusso, he soon learns to merge two styles into one for the ultimate martial arts showdown.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Adaptation of the adventures of the swinging comic-strip hero. A shy student becomes a crime fighter after a bite from a mutant spider, during a school outing, gives him extraordinary powers. As he comes to terms with his new-found abilities, he is also forced to contend with a maniac villain known as the Green Goblin.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The comic book web-slinger returns for a blockbusting sequel. Crime-fighting has cost Peter Parker his best friend and his true love Mary Jane. However, just as he quits as Spider-Man, New York comes under threat from Dr Octopus, a metal-tentacled madman. Peter has no choice but to swing back into action.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Life is sweet for Peter Parker, MJ loves him, her career is taking off and Spidey-mania is sweeping New York. However, when an alien parasite bonds to his suit, its not long before the good times and Spidey turn bad. While his ugly ego is taking centre stage, MJ is dumped from her Broadway show, Harry remembers Spider-Mans role in his fathers death, and Peter is consumed by revenge.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, high school student Peter Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man. When the evil Vulture emerges to cause havoc, everything Peter loves is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: Spider-Mans identity is revealed to everyone, and he can no longer separate his normal life from his superhero life. When he asks Doctor Strange for help, it forces him to discover what it means to be him.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker finds a clue that might help him understand why his parents disappeared when he was young. His path puts him on a collision course with Dr. Curt Connors, his fathers former partner.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The emergence of a powerful new villain and the return of an old friend bring Peter Parker to the realization that all his enemies have one thing in common: Oscorp. Based on Marvel Comics characters.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: After moving to China, twelve-year-old Dre Parker falls in love with his classmate Mei Ying. This soon comes to the attention of the class bully, Cheng.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: After moving to China, twelve-year-old Dre Parker falls in love with his classmate Mei Ying. This soon comes to the attention of the class bully, Cheng.

programme.title: Hostages
programme.desc: Comedy thriller about five strangers caught in an unfolding terrorism situation. Language. (2025, 90 mins)

programme.title: The Cinema List: Outlaws
programme.desc: Delve into the criminal underworld with a look at lawbreakers in film; from portrayals of ruthless crime bosses to true stories of thieves at large and smugglers on the run.

programme.title: Flavia
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Starring Martin Freeman and Jonathan Pryce. (2026)

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of paranoia, surviving off-grid with his daughter, Willa. When his nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her while battling the consequences of his past.

programme.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
programme.desc: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Tech billionaire Lex Luthor seizes the opportunity to get the Man of Steel out of the way for good. Will intrepid reporter Lois Lane and Supermans four-legged companion, Krypto, be able to help him before its too late?

programme.title: Roofman
programme.desc: Escaped convict Jeffrey Manchester hides out in a Toys "R" Us, surviving undetected for months while planning his next move. However, his double life starts to unravel when he falls for a divorced mum, setting off a compelling game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Caught Stealing
programme.desc: When his punk-rock neighbour asks him to take care of his cat for a few days, New York City bartender Hank Thompson suddenly finds himself caught in the middle of a motley crew of threatening gangsters who all want a piece of him.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Gator Creek
programme.desc: Vacation turns disaster when Kyle and her friends escape a plane crash in the desolate Louisiana everglades, only to discover theres something more dangerous lurking in the shallows.

programme.desc: The Mwambas rule a territory full of prey, but theres one animal they covet above all others.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Mekong
programme.desc: Thailand is a place of a thousand landscapes, dominated by lush forests, rolling hills and extensive rivers systems that feed into the mighty Mekong. Here the Mekong river continues its journey down the Eastern border, winding its way through biological and geological crossroads, sculpting the landscape and the lives of the creatures that live there.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Woolly monkey Orianas health check causes concern, the chimps have a bust-up and the guenon family try out a new tree in their enclosure.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: A video of a sick male marmoset results in an urgent rescue mission. It may be too late to save the male, but theres hope yet for a female at the same address.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: Dive into the crystal clear waters of Cozumel, a lush Caribbean paradise that hides the worlds largest subterranean underwater cave system.

programme.title: Arabian Inferno
programme.desc: The Arabian Peninsula is the worlds transit hub for 3 billion birds on migration to and from Europe, Africa and Asia. This episode tells the stories of the majestic raptors and magnificent waders - from the largest migrants to the smaller residents - how they fly, hunt and survive in this region of extremes - both in the wild desert and close to the urban jungle.

programme.title: Land of Primates

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: In Australias remote northwest, discover a land that defies time. "The Kimberley" spans over 400,000 square kilometres of remote tropical wilderness: turquoise coastlines, towering gorges, sandy deserts and sprawling savanna.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Vet Karina fights to save a koala mauled by dogs. Plus, rescue Chantel tries to pick up a peeved possum, while vet Meaghan bonds with a gaggle of goslings.

programme.title: Gangs of Lemur Island
programme.desc: Getting an unprecedented look into the highs and lows of life in a lemur family, with individual characters including matriarchs Crystal and Kati, feisty Juliette, and ladykiller Morris. Their personalities show how much like us lemurs really are.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Epic natural wonders are uncovered in the remote desert of the American southwest. From sweeping canyons bound by towering cliffs to fossilized dunes striped in desert red, the Paria Plateau is a geological marvel.

programme.desc: A police inspector is killed by a notorious gangster, who then raises his son, in hopes that he boy will grow up and kill the man framed for the murder.

programme.title: Dhund
programme.desc: On a dark and foggy night a mans car runs off the road. Needing a phone, the man discovers a deserted house in the fog, where he finds a dead man and the beautiful woman who killed him. He is drawn to her, and instead of turning her in, he helps her evade the police, creating a story together. The story is truer than they realise, and someone is arrested for the murder.

programme.title: Veergati

programme.title: Sachai Ki Taqat
programme.desc: A police constable fights against the system to prove his brothers innocence for a crime he didnt commit.

programme.title: Main Azad Hoon
programme.desc: A newspaper reporter pays a man to use his name to print stories about corrupt politicians, but when he becomes a champion of the ordinary man for real, the pressure gets too much for him.

programme.desc: A young woman leaves her daughter with Luke, who killed her husband.

programme.desc: The brother of a man accused of murder holds Nora hostage to get him released.

programme.title: A Taste Of Money
programme.desc: An elderly spinster plots to rob her employers with the perfect crime!

programme.title: A Question of Suspense
programme.desc: Directed by Max Varnel. Stars Peter Reynolds, Noelle Middleton and Yvonne Buckingham. A young woman sets out to get revenge against a rich man who murdered her lover.

programme.title: Inn for Trouble
programme.desc: A British couple serve up a potent potable when a local brewery begins siphoning off business from their country pub.

programme.title: Five Days
programme.desc: A man pays a hitman to kill him. Circumstances change and he tries to call off the hit but he has trouble getting the deal killed.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sir Lancelot
programme.desc: Sir Lancelot is given secret battle plans to deliver to Prince Boudwin. When Lancelot arrives at Prince Boudwins castle, he is captured by King Mark who attempts to push him into revealing the secret information.

programme.title: Adam Had Four Sons
programme.desc: A French governess raises a U.S. widowers sons, then returns to them years later despite one sons wife.

programme.title: Crown Court
programme.desc: Phil McDowell is on trial for the abduction of Fiona Sumner, a fourteen year old girl. He denies the offense.

programme.title: Crown Court
programme.desc: Fiona Sumner tells the court she initially agreed to go with McDowell but later changed her mind.

programme.title: Crown Court
programme.desc: Son of Philip McDowell tells the court that Fiona wanted to go on the trip to visit her father who she thought was dead.

programme.title: Went the Day Well?
programme.desc: A small English village is so cut off that the arrival of a car is an event. When lorryloads of Royal Engineers led by Major Ortler turn up, the villagers have no reason to suspect that they are really disguised German paratroopers.

programme.title: Strange But True
programme.desc: Michael Aspel looks at the unexplained stories of a man who had been called out to exorcise a fishing trawler, and three families who had travelled back in time.

programme.title: The Brothers
programme.desc: With strike action threatened, the Union is called in to settle the conflict and Ted negotiates a prosperous new contract.

programme.title: Saber of London
programme.desc: Mark Saber thinks he knows the answer when two people are found murdered after a gangster Sheik Babsons Bentley is hijacked.

programme.title: The Wheeltappers and Shunters Social Club
programme.desc: The Caravelles perform One of Those Songs and You Made Me Love You. Josef Locke performs Blaze Away and My Way. Eddie Flanagan and Judy Moxon also star.

programme.title: The Thirty-Nine Steps
programme.desc: An innocent man abroad is pursued by the police for a murder he did not commit and by international villains for information he knows nothing of.

programme.title: X, Y and Zee
programme.desc: A London architects raging wife finally gets even with him for his affair with a widow.

programme.title: Doomwatch
programme.desc: An investigation into a pesticide used by a ruthless company parallels the techniques it uses control its employees.

programme.title: The Gentleman Bandit
programme.desc: A Baltimore priest finds himself under arrest for a series of stick-ups. The social-minded priest is astounded by the police mix-up, but is even more shocked when a number of victims identify him as the culprit.

programme.title: The Gentleman Bandit
programme.desc: A Baltimore priest finds himself under arrest for a series of stick-ups. The social-minded priest is astounded by the police mix-up, but is even more shocked when a number of victims identify him as the culprit.

programme.desc: On 26 April 1986 the worst nuclear accident in history occurred. This is the detailed build up to how that disaster happened. Narrated by Robert Powell.

programme.title: Secret Scotland with Susan Calman
programme.desc: On the Orkney Islands, Susan discovers the role the Vikings played in Orcadian history. The final stage of her trip takes her back to wartime.At the Italian Chapel, Susan hears a tale that moves her to tears.

programme.title: Where Were You?
programme.desc: Four days before Christmas in 1988, Pan Am flight 103 fell in pieces from the night sky, plummeting to the ground in the small Scottish town of Lockerbie where things would never be the same again.

programme.title: Icons
programme.desc: The varied musical career and personal struggles of Kylie Minogue.

programme.title: The Story of London
programme.desc: The history of the City and how it was rebuilt after the Great Fire.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Steam Railway: All Aboard
programme.desc: At the steam gala, Piglets beloved 9F has serious competition from visiting engines.

programme.title: The Hotel
programme.desc: Its the school holidays and the Damson Dene hotel is full to bursting with families and their young children. From reception to the gardens, from the bedrooms to the hallways and even under tables in the dining room, kids are everywhere, pushing the staff to the limits. Even manager Wayne, who normally loves the family atmosphere at the hotel, admits that if he were going on holiday hed chose a child-free hotel.

programme.title: Irish Railways
programme.desc: We explore a further selection of films from Irish railway enthusiasts who set out in the early and mid 1960s to capture as much of the twilight of steam in Ulster in colour as they could.

programme.title: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Esra Kapla has a few months left in detention, but decides not to return to prison after a leave visit. Instead, she and her boyfriend, traumatised getaway driver Greg Driessen, go on the run.

programme.title: Asia in the Great War
programme.desc: In WWI, Japan fought on the side of the Allies, engaged in the only war in Asia, and protecting sea routes. How did the war impact their imperialist ambitions? E4 - Japan: An Ambitious Ally.

programme.title: WW1 Battles
programme.desc: On 31 July 1917, the Allies launch a renewed assault on German lines in the Flanders region of Belgium, in the much-contested region near Ypres, beginning more than three months of brutal fighting.

programme.title: Last Voices of World War I
programme.desc: Exploring the human carnage that followed each battle, featuring archive recollections from nurses, amputees, the gassed, and the shell shocked.

programme.title: Battle for the Skies: History of the RAF
programme.desc: Exploring the modern era of the RAF with the aircraft, C130 Hercules. This vehicle proved its capabilities in countless environments from resupply, to dropping paratroopers and was essential for maintaining dominance of the skies.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.sub-title: The Gulf War - Secrets in the Sand
programme.desc: Discover the clandestine operations by British SAS Commandos and US Special Forces deep in enemy territory during the Persian Gulf War and how they aided the effectiveness of the air war.

programme.title: When the Boat Comes In
programme.desc: The battle lines are drawn as Matt and Jack come up against businessmen in their bid to purchase property in Wellesley Street.

programme.title: Minder
programme.sub-title: Bury My Half at Waltham Green
programme.desc: Arthur gets Terry to mind an ex-bank robber who has just been released from jail.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: Ross must rise to the challenge of Parliament, but the distance from Cornwall brings trials of its own as George, refusing to accept defeat, begins stacking the odds in his favour. Ossie meanwhile tends to a dying parishioner, Nathaniel Pearce.

programme.title: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: The team are on the hunt for major vehicle thief Jed Wicklow, but when a car chase leads to his death, Gene stands accused of causing it through reckless driving. Alex is adamant that there was something wrong with Jed at the wheel, and wants to prove that the crash was not Genes fault. However, an investigation that has already met with resistance, someone in the police force also appears to be standing in their way.

programme.title: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When Mrs Hollingbery gets a job to help save for their wedding, Alf is not pleased. In fact life itself is losing its appeal.

programme.title: Where were you? Events that Changed the World

programme.title: Icons

programme.title: Football Heroes

programme.title: The Hotel
programme.desc: Checking in to the Damson Dene are Richard and Rebecca from Manchester, who have two young babies and havent spent a night on their own for 14 months. Richards just turned 30, and when Rebecca asked him what he wanted for his birthday, he said "a nights sleep". Also visiting the Damson Dene are Simon, an engineer for the Royal Navy, and his Brazilian girlfriend Vanusa, whom he met while on a naval posting oversea.

programme.desc: We explore a further selection of films from Irish railway enthusiasts who set out in the early and mid 1960s to capture as much of the twilight of steam in Ulster in colour as they could.

programme.title: Secret Allied Aircraft of WWII

programme.title: WWII POWs: Long March
programme.desc: Veterans reveal the real reasons they joined the fighting forces. They tell of inadequate training, of meeting the enemy, and the shocking realities of combat and capture. Ep1: Capture.

programme.title: Last Voices of World War I
programme.desc: The story of 1917 and the terrible battles at Arras and Passchendaele. Countless numbers drowned in mud during battles that remains synonymous with the horror of mechanised warfare.

programme.desc: Follow the evolution of aerial eavesdropping, from balloons to wooden bi-planes, and from the birth of photographic reconnaissance units to todays spy satellites.

The Captain insists on utilising his skills in surveillance to help Alison find out the truth. After an emailing prank by Julian gets out of hand, Mike has some awkward explaining to do to his boss, which Julian and Robin are gleeful to have front row seats for.

programme.title: Toast of London
programme.desc: Toasts excitement at winning a part in a new play is tempered by two facts. One, his nemesis, Ray Purchase, is also in it. Two, theres a rumour his director, Acker Herron, has a history of murdering difficult actors.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Whos That Looking Sideways at Nelly?
programme.desc: Hobbo, former milkman and undercover agent at Primrose Dairies, is ready for any dangerous situation, and going round telling everyone that Nelly is his mother is one. Another danger arises when he demonstrates his gift of disguise, and finds himself the new recipient of Marinas affections. Hobbo then discovers the danger of exercising when his neck locks solid while doing some simple head movements.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Nobody Messes With Tony the Throat
programme.desc: Howard is deeply concerned when Pearl starts going out every day with Nelly, and she will not say where. programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Tim is worried that he isnt manly enough, Lee is persuaded by Lucy to pretend to be gay in order for her to get closer to a new business acquaintance, and Lee discovers theres something in it for him, but doesnt find it easy to keep his blokeish instincts hidden.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in upstairs, and his constant noise drives Lucy to distraction. She begs Lee and Tim to get him to stop, but neither is man enough. Tim takes being branded a coward to heart, and rushes off to join a boxing gym. Lee, meanwhile, tries to impress Lucy by confronting the man in his own flat, where he finds himself staring into the eyes of a cold killer.

programme.desc: Dermot has been sacked for dangling a customer by the ankles. And Gary has been offered a new job - but now he has to tell his staff they might need a new one too.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: After reading a love letter for Bunny Warren, Fletcher imparts his wisdom to Bunny regarding the fairer sex, but it seems Fletcher doesnt know quite as much as he thinks when his daughter Ingrid brings him news from home.

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Boycie cant believe that his staff are auditioning for a reality TV show, but the lure of fame proves too much to resist. Meanwhile, Marlene has some plans of her own for when hes away.

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Young Mr Grace decides that the store should open at half past eight so that people can shop on their way to work, but the staff arent happy and try to sabotage the sales figures.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Stella Find True Love with Norris Fairburn?
programme.desc: When Clegg and Truly tell Hobbo that local serial groom Norris Fairburn is free again, he decides that Norris would be an ideal husband for Stella. At the cafe, Ivy observes and listens as Hobbo, Alvin and Entwistle discuss their fool-proof scheme. Later, Ivy warns Stella about the plot to provide her with one house-trained potential husband.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Randolph Make a Good Impression?
programme.desc: Hobbo turns up at the river wall with Randolph, who he hopes will bring romance into Stellas life. Randolph seems to lack any of the requirements of a potential suitor, and is limp and unattractive, especially after Hobbo drops him in the river. After a little rehearsal and some invaluable tips on how to give Stella `the look, Randolph demonstrates that he has no chance whatsoever of impressing her.

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin has entered the pub snooker tournament, but when he discovers that Paul has also entered, he becomes very pessimistic about his chances. Hes convinced that Paul will win and that he will be humiliated.

programme.desc: The crew use their rifles and their wits to compete for the honour of guarding a VIP.

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin has entered the pub snooker tournament, but when he discovers that Paul has also entered, he becomes very pessimistic about his chances. Hes convinced that Paul will win and that he will be humiliated.

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Young Mr Grace decides that the store should open at half past eight so that people can shop on their way to work, but the staff arent happy and try to sabotage the sales figures.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: After reading a love letter for Bunny Warren, Fletcher imparts his wisdom to Bunny regarding the fairer sex, but it seems Fletcher doesnt know quite as much as he thinks when his daughter Ingrid brings him news from home.

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: The crew use their rifles and their wits to compete for the honour of guarding a VIP.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Stella Find True Love with Norris Fairburn?
programme.desc: When Clegg and Truly tell Hobbo that local serial groom Norris Fairburn is free again, he decides that Norris would be an ideal husband for Stella. At the cafe, Ivy observes and listens as Hobbo, Alvin and Entwistle discuss their fool-proof scheme. Later, Ivy warns Stella about the plot to provide her with one house-trained potential husband.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Randolph Make a Good Impression?
programme.desc: Hobbo turns up at the river wall with Randolph, who he hopes will bring romance into Stellas life. Randolph seems to lack any of the requirements of a potential suitor, and is limp and unattractive, especially after Hobbo drops him in the river. After a little rehearsal and some invaluable tips on how to give Stella `the look, Randolph demonstrates that he has no chance whatsoever of impressing her.

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Richard isnt exactly over the moon with his birthday present, but thats only the start of a series of problems.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: After reading a love letter for Bunny Warren, Fletcher imparts his wisdom to Bunny regarding the fairer sex, but it seems Fletcher doesnt know quite as much as he thinks when his daughter Ingrid brings him news from home.

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: Captain Mainwaring is challenged by Captain Ogilvy and the Highland Regiment to a war game, with uplifting results.

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Young Mr Grace decides that the store should open at half past eight so that people can shop on their way to work, but the staff arent happy and try to sabotage the sales figures.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee finally manages to get a job as a caretaker, but taking up the new post involves moving out of the flat. Elsewhere, Kate interviews potential new flatmates including Pete, and Tim sees an opportunity to get back together with Kate. Plus, Lees new boss proves to be a hard taskmaster. So, will Lee stick at the job or throw in the towel and move back in with Kate?

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: As Lucy and Guys relationship intensifies, Lee starts to ponder his lack of a girlfriend and, encouraged by Barbara, tries speed dating. Meanwhile, Tim is forced to go on a disastrous date with Barbara in order to prove that he sees her as more than `the help.

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Changes are afoot - Tony returns from his holidays sporting a beard, and Dorothy has moved into the flat.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes is disappointed with Cathy when she decides to get a boob job to impress her boyfriend Professor Clowne. Agnes is also distinctly unimpressed with Buster when she meets the man hes hired to measure up her kitchen. Meanwhile, Professor Clowne has a life-changing proposal for Cathy, if he could only find the perfect moment to ask her his very important question.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: While Alison and Mike gear up to make a big investment, the Captain and Kitty work together with the other ghosts to solve an unfolding mystery before its too late.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When the landlord of the local pub is advised to take a rest by his doctor, Terry and June offer to run the place in his absence. However, their good deed looks set to backfire when Sir Dennis threatens to sack anyone found guilty of moonlighting.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry loves to be the centre of attention, but when he discovers he bears an uncanny resemblance to a criminal, he wishes the spotlight would focus on someone else.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry experiences pangs of jealousy when June arranges to meet a childhood sweetheart. Misunderstandings and advice from Sir Dennis compound the situation.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry and June play the cow in the office pantomime but have difficulty getting out of their costume when the hall is evacuated because of a fire scare.

programme.desc: Terrys quest for a more youthful look and the perfect body causes June to take drastic action of her own.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Modern Wheels or Classic Steals
programme.desc: Bik has just retired and is wondering whether his next car should be a retirement present to himself. Alternatively, it could also be a practical family car to cater for his four tall children.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Nothing screams 1970s more than a Mk3 Ford Cortina 2000E. Derek Mathewson heads to Brigg to value a 1974 example with classic Coke bottle styling and a sweet Pinto engine.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave goes to Wales in order to purchase a Sierra Cosworth, a sought-after car in the bidding market. Dad Derek gets his hands on a more sedate 1926 Standard Tourer - a quirky little motor.

programme.desc: Derek heads to Suffolk to collect two Bentleys with a majestic pedigree, with their own names: Cynthia a stunning 1963 S3 and Harry, a 1965 Continental.

programme.desc: Dave heads to West Yorkshire to collect a rare 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car that is expected to sell for more than a few coppers.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: This week at the Mathewsons, there is a 1982 Audi Quattro and a Sunbeam Alpine. Plus, Derek takes delivery of a beautiful green Renault van, previously used as a bread van in Paris.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Nothing screams 1970s more than a Mk3 Ford Cortina 2000E. Derek Mathewson heads to Brigg to value a 1974 example with classic Coke bottle styling and a sweet Pinto engine.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave goes to Wales in order to purchase a Sierra Cosworth, a sought-after car in the bidding market. Dad Derek gets his hands on a more sedate 1926 Standard Tourer - a quirky little motor.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Suffolk to collect two Bentleys with a majestic pedigree, with their own names: Cynthia a stunning 1963 S3 and Harry, a 1965 Continental.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.sub-title: Terri, Esme and the Chi Family
programme.desc: Pete meets the four-legged friends that call the UKs leading dog welfare charity, Dogs Trust, home. From when they are rescued, Pete plays an instrumental role in their rehabilitation process, right up until the point the dogs are safely rehomed.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: This edition features two couples who have stuck together despite the challenges life has thrown at them. Ryan started dating Keely when they were both at school, but to their shock Keely fell pregnant very quickly. Katie says she is the grown up in the relationship and her fiance Steve is like a child. In the delivery suite, Steve is on form constantly mucking about and generally driving Katie up the wall.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Leah is having her sixth baby but unfortunately her partner is in prison and will miss the birth. Meanwhile, Becky met Police Sergeant John one Halloween when he was dressed as a witch and it was love at first sight. Within weeks they were engaged and trying for the child theyd both always wanted.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its a day of firsts for the junior doctors. Claire confronts her fears with her first child patient, Tejas steps up to his first trauma case, and Adrian faces his first chest drain.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its the Reading Festival and the junior doctors have no idea whats in store, from a possible drug overdose to a mosh pit injury.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build Ireland
programme.desc: Baz Ashmawy and the team focus on rehousing Ukrainian refugees in six vacant terraced houses at Kingston College in Mitchelstown, North Cork.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis meets Oscar-winning actress Dame Judi Dench. Having graced the stage and screen for over 60 years, including iconic turns as Queen Elizabeth in Shakespeare in Love and MI5 chief M in Bond, Judi is regarded as one of Britains greatest ever actors. Louis meets Judi at her home in Surrey for a candid and lively conversation about her long career, her passion for theatre and her life away from acting.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: West Midlands paramedics assess a man that the police have found acting erratically on a busy dual carriageway, the police believe he has taken the powerful psychoactive, Monkey Dust.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: The owners of an excitable cocker spaniel hope Professor Noel Fitzpatrick can fix her leg problems by fitting two bionic back feet. Noel also launches a series of investigations into what is causing a cat to drag its leg.

programme.title: The Supervet

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: South Central paramedics race to a newborn baby with a low temperature, while crews in Oxford and Portsmouth deal with a man vomiting blood and a patients mysterious hip pain.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The team treat a lorry driver trapped behind his twisted steering wheel and help is urgently required for a 12-year-old who appears to be drunk after drinking an unknown substance.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The discovery of underwear on a canal bank sparks a risky missing persons search and a police incident ends in a fleeing car passenger jumping over a wall and breaking his leg.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Stacey and Gavin return from honeymoon to a big welcome from both families. However, Smithy seems none too happy with his best mate and Nessa has a confession to make that throws the whole evening into disarray.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Devastated by the news hes to become a father, Smithy goes AWOL. The boys finally track him down, but can he be persuaded to do the right thing? Stacey is shocked to hear of Gwens new domestic arrangements as the prospect of living in Essex finally hits her.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Stacey is getting used to being an Essex wife, but its not as exciting as shed hoped, however, she bucks up at the weekend, when its time for a home visit to Barry. Meanwhile, Smithy goes with Nessa for the first scan and they get the first glimpse of their baby.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build Ireland
programme.desc: Baz Ashmawy and his team set out to renovate the homes of deserving families, changing their lives forever, but with only nine days to transform each home, and dependent on the generosity of volunteers, the pressure is truly on.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics are called out to a 67-year-old who has a lung condition and cant breathe. Plus, the crews assist a 53-year-old who has ended up having several seizures.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo reaches the most westerly station in Wales, Milford Haven, the biggest energy port in the United Kingdom. He then heads north, visiting Britains smallest city and its cathedral.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: North West and Isle of Man: Part 1
programme.desc: Michael Portillo begins a new train journey on the Isle of Man, where the three-legged symbol proudly reminds us of its self-rule and Celtic and Viking heritage.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: North West and Isle of Man: Part 2
programme.desc: Michael Portillo arrives in Liverpool where he visits the International Slavery Museum.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: North West and Isle of Man: Part 3
programme.desc: Michael Portillos journey along the north-west coast of England brings him to Morecambe in Lancashire, where he samples a delicious seafood cocktail.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: With his pooch Iris to navigate, Dereks off to Bradford to pick up a 1920s Cyclecar replica and an 1930 MGM race car thats been brought back to life following a nasty smash.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Jack and Amy are on a poignant trip to collect some motorbikes from a widow in the North East of England.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: While Bomber Command are unable to hit their targets precisely and begin bombing German cities under cover of darkness, the Americans reinforce the daytime attacks.

programme.title: True Evil: Making of a Nazi
programme.desc: Hermann Goering, the dashing young war veteran down on his luck, who turns into an extravagant, heartless, obese, drug-addled Nazi billionaire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow returns to one of the grandest houses in Wales, Powis Castle. Mark Hill is intrigued by a ventriloquists dummy with an unusual hairpiece, while Geoffrey Munn is amazed to discover a love token crafted from a swans feather woven with gold that has survived for over 300 years.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A look back through the archives at some of the most intriguing artefacts with royal connections that have appeared on the programme. Fiona Bruce gets a peek inside Westminster Abbey where coronation preparations are in full swing, while the team see brand new items with links to royalty in the stunning grounds of Fulham Palace.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team fall for a Subaru Pick-up, which has all the Mathewsons in agreement. But will it all come crashing down when picking up parts proves tricky?

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A 1973 Ford Escort Mexico is the teams most expensive purchase to date. To save some cash Derek helps on their second buy - a 1968 Riley Kestrel.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: While Bomber Command are unable to hit their targets precisely and begin bombing German cities under cover of darkness, the Americans reinforce the daytime attacks.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer
programme.desc: The second leg of the journey sees Simon dodge the Moroccan secret police in Western Sahara, travel on one of the worlds longest trains in Mauritania, visit a forgotten refugee camp in the Algerian desert where more than 100,000 people live, and take a swim in a Libyan oasis with a government minder who bears an uncanny resemblance to Colonel Gadaffi.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Jacks baby Max makes his podium debut with Great Grandad Derek. Paul visits a former stock car racer and finds a Pinto pimped Anglia and a Talbot Sunbeam Lotus.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads north to pick up a 1954 Morgan +4 coupe in mint condition and believed to be just one of three still on the road.

programme.title: Resto My Ride

programme.desc: A 1973 Ford Escort Mexico is the teams most expensive purchase to date. To save some cash Derek helps on their second buy - a 1968 Riley Kestrel.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon repurposes some old suitcases while Henry gives an old dresser some serious bling.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley

programme.title: Resto My Ride

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A 1973 Ford Escort Mexico is the teams most expensive purchase to date. To save some cash Derek helps on their second buy - a 1968 Riley Kestrel.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek makes the short trip to a mysterious Yorkshire beauty spot to pick up a 1920s style bus that isnt all that it seems.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon repurposes some old suitcases while Henry gives an old dresser some serious bling.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer

programme.title: Porridge

programme.title: Porridge

programme.title: Porridge

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Duplicate
programme.desc: A chef and a career criminal have identical faces but lead vastly different lives.

programme.title: Ram Setu
programme.desc: An atheist archaeologist turned believer races against time to prove the true existence of the legendary Ram Setu before evil forces destroy the pillar of Indias heritage.

programme.title: Bachna Ae Haseeno
programme.desc: Raj Sharma has left behind a series of short-term relationships, but one day he meets a taxi driver, Gayatri, whom he falls in love with. However, he worries that his past will catch up with him.

programme.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
programme.desc: A man struggles to win over members of his girlfriends family, who all want her to marry someone else.

programme.title: Maine Pyaar Kyun Kiya
programme.desc: A flirtatious orthopedic surgeon Samir befriends beautiful girls and then dumps them saying that he is married. Chaos starts when the girl who Samir falls in love with insists on meeting his wife.

programme.title: Ribbon
programme.desc: Following a married couple and the challenges they face when they have to deal with unplanned parenthood.

programme.title: Ishwar Sakshi
programme.desc: A man promises to marry his daughter to a young man in front of a statue of Vishnu as his witness. Later the father refuses and the young man appeals to Vishnu for help.

programme.title: Abhimaan
programme.desc: Tension mounts between a fading singer and his wife, whose musical career is steadily rising, rapidly overtaking his.

programme.title: Lamhe
programme.desc: Viren falls in love at first sight when he sees the beautiful Pallavi, but is too shy to let her know his feelings. He then realises she is in love with Siddharth, whom she goes on to marry. When Pallavi and Siddharth die in a car crash, Viren takes charge of their daughter Pooja. As the years pass, Viren and Pooja fall in love, but Viren is not prepared to accept his feelings for a girl so much younger than himself.

programme.title: Yamla Pagla Deewana
programme.desc: A married Canadian travels to India to re-unite with his estranged father and brother but faces obstacles and challenges.

programme.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
programme.desc: Shruti and Bittoo, two graduates from Delhi, reluctantly enter the business world together by creating a wedding planning enterprise.

programme.title: Laal Singh Chaddha
programme.desc: A simple man with a disability embarks on an extraordinary journey, meeting many friends along the way.

programme.title: Jigra
programme.desc: A young woman with a troubled past embarks on a dangerous mission. Her goal is to help her younger brother, who is imprisoned in a foreign jail.

programme.title: Shootout at Lokhandwala
programme.desc: On a calm summer day in 1991, in the bustling Lokhandwala Complex, five criminals including Maya and Dilip were counting 70 lakhs in flat No 32B, when 286 policemen, headed by ACP Khan, took strategic positions around their building. A gunfire ensued and the entire nation witnessed the most talked about daylight encounter lasting 6 hours that transformed suburban Mumbai into a virtual war zone.
